det_check_template:
proof fn det_pop_scheduler_for_idle_cpu(pre_self_: ProcessManager, cpu_id: CpuId, pre_pt_regs: Registers, post1_self_: ProcessManager, post1_pt_regs: Registers, r1: ThreadPtr, post2_self_: ProcessManager, post2_pt_regs: Registers, r2: ThreadPtr)
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (0 <= cpu_id < NUM_CPUS), (pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].active == true), (pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].current_thread.is_None()), (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).scheduler.len() != 0),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure())
            &&& (post1_self_.proc_dom() =~= pre_self_.proc_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.endpoint_dom() == pre_self_.endpoint_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.thread_dom().contains(r1))
            &&& (forall|p_ptr: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]
                post1_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) ==> post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr) =~= pre_self_.get_proc(
                    p_ptr,
                ))
            &&& (forall|container_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container(container_ptr)]
                post1_self_.container_dom().contains(container_ptr) && container_ptr != pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container ==> post1_self_.get_container(container_ptr)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_container(container_ptr))
            &&& (forall|t_ptr: ThreadPtr|
                #![trigger pre_self_.get_thread(t_ptr)]
                pre_self_.thread_dom().contains(t_ptr) && t_ptr != r1 ==> pre_self_.get_thread(
                    t_ptr,
                ) =~= post1_self_.get_thread(t_ptr))
            &&& (forall|e_ptr: EndpointPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr)]
                pre_self_.endpoint_dom().contains(e_ptr) ==> pre_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr)
                    =~= post1_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).quota
                == post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).quota)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).owned_cpus
                == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_cpus)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_threads == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_threads)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).scheduler@.skip(1) == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).scheduler@)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_endpoints == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_endpoints)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).children
                == post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).children)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_thread(r1).ipc_payload =~= post1_self_.get_thread(r1).ipc_payload)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_thread(r1).state =~= ThreadState::RUNNING)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_thread(r1).endpoint_descriptors =~= post1_self_.get_thread(
                r1,
            ).endpoint_descriptors)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure())
            &&& (post2_self_.proc_dom() =~= pre_self_.proc_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.endpoint_dom() == pre_self_.endpoint_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom())
            &&& (post2_self_.thread_dom().contains(r2))
            &&& (forall|p_ptr: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]
                post2_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) ==> post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr) =~= pre_self_.get_proc(
                    p_ptr,
                ))
            &&& (forall|container_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_container(container_ptr)]
                post2_self_.container_dom().contains(container_ptr) && container_ptr != pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container ==> post2_self_.get_container(container_ptr)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_container(container_ptr))
            &&& (forall|t_ptr: ThreadPtr|
                #![trigger pre_self_.get_thread(t_ptr)]
                pre_self_.thread_dom().contains(t_ptr) && t_ptr != r2 ==> pre_self_.get_thread(
                    t_ptr,
                ) =~= post2_self_.get_thread(t_ptr))
            &&& (forall|e_ptr: EndpointPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr)]
                pre_self_.endpoint_dom().contains(e_ptr) ==> pre_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr)
                    =~= post2_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).quota
                == post2_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).quota)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).owned_cpus
                == post2_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_cpus)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_threads == post2_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_threads)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).scheduler@.skip(1) == post2_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).scheduler@)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_endpoints == post2_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container,
            ).owned_endpoints)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).children
                == post2_self_.get_container(pre_self_.cpu_list@[cpu_id as int].owning_container).children)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_thread(r2).ipc_payload =~= post2_self_.get_thread(r2).ipc_payload)
            &&& (post2_self_.get_thread(r2).state =~= ThreadState::RUNNING)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_thread(r2).endpoint_descriptors =~= post2_self_.get_thread(
                r2,
            ).endpoint_descriptors)
        }) ==> det_pop_scheduler_for_idle_cpu_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_, post1_pt_regs, post2_pt_regs),
{
{ASSUMES}}
